% https://q.uiver.app/#
\documentclass[tikz]{standalone}
\usepackage{quiver}
\begin{document}
\begin{tikzcd}[ampersand replacement=\&]
	{\Sigma_0} \&\& {\Sigma_0\times I} \&\& {\Sigma_0} \\
	\\
	\&\& {\Sigma_1}
	\arrow["{(\mathrm{id}_X,0)}", hook, from=1-1, to=1-3]
	\arrow["{\phi_0}"', from=1-1, to=3-3]
	\arrow["\phi"', from=1-3, to=3-3]
	\arrow["{(\mathrm{id}_X,1)}"', hook', from=1-5, to=1-3]
	\arrow["{\phi_1}", from=1-5, to=3-3]
\end{tikzcd}
\end{document}
